prompt: A high-energy cyberpop promotional poster for an AI video workflow, featuring 5 young female dance performers in a confident K-pop-inspired formation on a futuristic neon stage. The center performer stands slightly forward with hands on hips, wearing a white asymmetrical crop top and a dark blue sequined mini skirt, long light brown wavy hair, athletic slim build. Flanking her are 2 performers in matching black leather crop tops and black leather shorts, also hands on hips, long dark hair, bold stage styling. On the far left is 1 performer in a pink corset-style sleeveless top and white pleated mini skirt. On the far right is 1 performer in a fitted white cropped jacket and white mini skirt. All 5 women wear glamorous concert styling, bare legs, and statement necklaces, with strong stage confidence and symmetrical spacing. Behind them, enormous Chinese headline text dominates the upper half: 影片工作流, rendered in oversized metallic white 3D block letters with hot pink and purple neon glow, glossy highlights, and beveled edges. Beneath the headline are 6 workflow labels in glowing capsule boxes, split into two groups: left side 3 labels "策划", "拍摄", "剪辑"; right side 3 labels "调色", "特效", "输出". The background is a dark concert-like sci-fi environment with radiant purple laser beams, starburst lens flares, magenta light streaks, and a reflective glossy floor mirroring the figures and lighting. Use a wide cinematic composition, centered poster layout, ultra-saturated magenta-violet palette, polished commercial key art, dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, glossy skin highlights, and a sleek AI-generated entertainment marketing aesthetic. Make it look like a bold social media cover image for a one-stop AI music video production pipeline.
